subcodes.first_line: This is a Day whereon both the Witness and the Witnessed lament by reason of that which hath befallen the kindred of the Messenger at the hands of them that have denied God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا یوم فیه ینوح الشاهد و المشهود بما ورد علی آل الرسول من الذین کفروا بالله
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @consolation and comfort, @suffering and imprisonment
